fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis in a variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` contains the metadata for one axis of a variable font, including its four-byte tag, allowed range, default value, and visibility. Use <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters(System.Span{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis})> to retrieve the axes supported by a typeface.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"Axis: {axis.Tag}, Min: {axis.Min}, Default: {axis.Default}, Max: {axis.Max}");
}
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the default value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The default design-space value for the axis.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> and is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.
Gets or sets a value indicating whether this axis should be hidden from user interfaces.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the axis is intended to be hidden; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The maximum design-space value for the axis.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the minimum allowed value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The minimum design-space value for the axis.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying this variation axis.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> that identifies the axis, such as <c>wght</c> for weight or <c>wdth</c> for width.
